name: Specs List View
summary: Tabular list view of spec nodes with filtering and sorting capabilities
goals: Display spec nodes in a searchable, sortable list format
Provide quick navigation to spec details from the list

specDetail.description: A SpecsList component that renders spec nodes as a filterable, sortable table or card list. Shows node name, level, status, last sync date, and parent path. Supports search, filtering by status/level, and sorting by various fields.

parameters.name: nodes
parameters.description: Array of spec nodes to display

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Active filters: status, level, domain, search text

parameters.name: sortField
parameters.description: Field to sort by (name, level, status, lastSyncAt)

parameters.name: onNodeSelect
parameters.description: Callback when a node row is clicked

constraints: Must support filtering by status, level, and domain simultaneously
Must update the list in real-time as filters are changed (debounced search)
Must show the full parent path for each node (breadcrumb style)

acceptanceCriteria.given: spec nodes exist across multiple domains and levels
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user applies a filter by domain
acceptanceCriteria.then: only nodes matching the selected domain are displayed with updated counts

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
